parameters.query:
-- Limpieza diaria: borrar ofertas basura de mercado (precio < 2000€)
DELETE FROM moveadvisor_market_offers WHERE price < 2000;

-- Recalcular is_active por umbral de portal
UPDATE moveadvisor_market_offers
SET is_active = (
  CASE
    WHEN portal IN ('autoscout24','cochescom','milanuncios') THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '9 days'
    WHEN portal IN ('flexicar','autohero','wallapop') THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
    WHEN portal = 'autocasion' THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '25 days'
    ELSE last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  END
), updated_at = NOW()
WHERE is_active IS DISTINCT FROM (
  CASE
    WHEN portal IN ('autoscout24','cochescom','milanuncios') THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '9 days'
    WHEN portal IN ('flexicar','autohero','wallapop') THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days'
    WHEN portal = 'autocasion' THEN last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '25 days'
    ELSE last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'
  END
)
  AND portal <> 'flexicar'
